long_chain: Remove the Oriental Pearl Tower and replace the central area with a massive, swirling portal of blue energy rising from the ground.
Transform the surrounding skyscrapers into floating rock islands suspended in the air around the blue energy portal.

Add giant, translucent jellyfish-like creatures floating through the air among the floating rock islands.
Transform the ground level vegetation and parks into glowing, bioluminescent alien flora with purple and green hues.
Apply a heavy snowfall of white ash falling from the pink and teal nebula sky onto the floating rock islands.
Shift the lighting to a dramatic, high-contrast chiaroscuro style with deep shadows cast by the floating rock islands.
